heading: Regions with at Least Three Fault Domains
body:
If the selected Azure (Microsoft Azure) region has at least three
fault domains, Atlas clusters are split across three fault domains. For
example, a three node replica set cluster would have one node deployed onto
each zone.

![A 3-node replica set deployed across a 3-fault-domain Azure region.](/reference/images/microsoft-azure-3az.svg)

3FD (Three Fault Domain) clusters have higher availability
compared to 2FD (Two Fault Domain) clusters. However, not all
regions support 3FD (Three Fault Domain) clusters.
